description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:slim Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs build-essential, pkg-config and libssl-dev, installs the Rust toolchain version from $RUST_VERSION with rustup, sets it as default, and prints rustc and cargo versions. Define a cache keyed by $CI_PIPELINE_ID-$RUST_VERSION covering /usr/local/cargo/registry, /usr/local/rustup/toolchains, /usr/local/rustup/update-hashes, and target/, and set the stages check, test, release, and trigger. Add check-beta, check-nightly, check-old, and check-stable jobs in the check stage that each set RUST_VERSION to beta, nightly, 1.56.1, and stable respectively and execute cargo check --verbose. Add a cargo-test job in the test stage that runs cargo test --verbose and then cargo test with no default features for the feature sets send3,crypto-ring; send2,crypto-openssl; send3,crypto-openssl; and send2,send3,crypto-openssl. Add a crate job in the release stage that runs only on tags matching a version pattern, echoes a release message, logs into crates.io with $CARGO_TOKEN via cargo login, and publishes the crate with cargo publish --verbose. Add a trigger-ffsend job in the trigger stage that runs only on version tags, installs curl, and triggers a downstream pipeline by POSTing to the GitLab API with $FFSEND_TOKEN and ref=master.
